# League of Legends Patch 26.5 Notes

https://www.leagueoflegends.com/en-us/news/game-updates/league-of-legends-patch-26-5-notes/

Welcome to the official patch of First Stand! Pro-focused mid lane retuning, bot lane adjustment, roster-wide outlier buffs/nerfs, and a pile of system updates.

## Patch Highlights

Akali, Garen, Orianna, Lee Sin, and more.

## Champions

### Akali

Currently, Akali's re-stealth timer on her Shroud scales with game time. And since we've adjusted Summoner's Rift's pacing and League now has multiple modes with varying start times, we think everyone benefits from making this scale with champion level instead.

#### W - Twilight Shroud

- Restealth Timer: 1s / .9s / .825s / .725s / .625s (at game times 0:00 8:00 11:00 20:00 30:00) ⇒ 1s / .9s / .825s / .725s / .625s (at levels 1 7 10 13 16)

### Azir

Late-game health reduced to give assassins counterplay against the emperor.

#### Base Stats

- Health Growth: 119 ⇒ 108

### Garen

Better early trading power and fighter item parity with crit builds.

#### Q - Decisive Strike

- Move Speed Duration: 1 / 1.65 / 2.3 / 2.95 / 3.6 ⇒ 1.4 / 1.95 / 2.5 / 3.05 / 3.6

#### E - Judgment

- Damage per Spin: 4 / 7 / 10 / 13 / 16 (+38 / 41 / 44 / 47 / 50% AD) ⇒ 4 / 7 / 10 / 13 / 16 (+40 / 43 / 46 / 49 / 52% AD)

### Lee Sin

Less punishing early clears, with higher base damage on E.

#### E - Tempest

- Base Damage: 35 / 65 / 95 / 125 / 155 ⇒ 45 / 72 / 99 / 126 / 153

### Lillia

Lillia's passive heal is too reliable in the early game.

#### Passive - Dream-Laden Bough

- Heal per Tick: 6 / 9 / 12 / 15 ⇒ 3 / 7 / 11 / 15

### Nocturne

Nocturne ult CD is too long early, making him feel useless before level 11.

#### R - Paranoia

- Cooldown: 150 / 125 / 100 ⇒ 140 / 120 / 100

### Orianna

Orianna's cooldowns are letting her zone for free in pro play.

#### Q - Command: Attack

- Cooldown: 6 / 5.25 / 4.5 / 3.75 / 3s ⇒ 7 / 6 / 5 / 4 / 3s

### Renata Glasc

Renata's shield is underperforming compared to Lulu and Janna.

#### E - Loyalty Program

- Shield: 50 / 80 / 110 / 140 / 170 ⇒ 60 / 90 / 120 / 150 / 180

### Smolder

Smolder's late-game scaling is too safe.

#### Q - Super Scorcher Breath

- Base Damage: 15 / 25 / 35 / 45 / 55 ⇒ 15 / 23 / 31 / 39 / 47

### Swain

Swain's drain-tank pattern is too effective with the current item ecosystem.

#### R - Demonic Ascension

- Drain per Second: 20 / 40 / 60 ⇒ 15 / 35 / 55

### Varus

Varus AP ratio on W proc getting a small buff to open up AP builds.

#### W - Blighted Quiver

- On-Hit Damage: 7 / 9 / 11 / 13 / 15 (+30% AP) ⇒ 7 / 9 / 11 / 13 / 15 (+35% AP)

### Volibear

Volibear's tower disable duration too punishing.

#### R - Stormbringer

- Tower Disable Duration: 3 / 4 / 5s ⇒ 2 / 3 / 4s

### Yone

Yone's fleet footwork build is too safe in lane.

#### Base Stats

- Health Regen: 7.5 ⇒ 6.5

### Zeri

Zeri's base AD is too high for a scaling marksman.

#### Base Stats

- Base AD: 53 ⇒ 50

## Items

### Hubris

Hubris is a bit too expensive for its niche.

- Total Cost: 3200 ⇒ 3000
- Combine Cost: 800 ⇒ 600

### Locket of the Iron Solari

Locket's shield is too back-loaded.

- Shield: 200 / 255 / 310 / 365 / 420 ⇒ 230 / 280 / 330 / 380 / 420

## Ranked

Autofill rates are being adjusted downward across all ranks.

We've seen too many games where autofilled players are significantly underperforming.

## Gameplay

### Last Hit Indicators

New last hit indicators are available in settings. They show a visual cue when minions are in kill range.

## Behavioral Systems

### Chat Penalties

Severe chat penalty escalation is live. Toxic behavior now results in faster and longer restrictions.

## Modes

### Brawl

Brawl returns for a limited time! Queue up for 5v5 teamfights on Howling Abyss with special items.

## ARAM: Mayhem

ARAM Mayhem updated — 14 augments buffed, 2 nerfed, 2 new augments added.

## Arena

Arena bugfixes for round timer and augment selection.

## Bugfixes

- Fixed an issue where Garen E could hit turrets through terrain
- Fixed Lee Sin Q hitbox being slightly larger than intended
- Fixed Akali shroud interaction with Oracle Lens

## Upcoming Skins

New skins coming in 26.6: Star Guardian Akali, Battle Boss Garen
